metadata.note: Transcribed catalogue for Roll20 pregen/import preparation.

gear.name: Basic Medpatch
gear.description: A quick-stick patch that seals small wounds

gear.name: Hello Stray Cat bandage
gear.description: A cute bandage, with kitties and hearts <3

gear.name: Synthetic Blood Pack
gear.description: Pre-typed synthetic blood for rapid infusion.

gear.name: Homemade Flashbang
gear.traits: Thrown: 30 Feet. Blind in 10 Feet radius. DC 10 Evasion Save. Demolitions

gear.name: Smoke Canister
gear.traits: Thrown: 30 Feet. Creates 10 Feet radius of Partial Cover. Demolitions

gear.name: EMP Grenade
gear.traits: Thrown, 30 Feet. Damage: 1D6 EMP (Blast 10 Feet). Demolitions

gear.name: Quickjack Spike
gear.description: Fast jack-in. Allows Hacking, once. +2 to next Hack attempt.

gear.name: Signal Scrambler
gear.description: Blocks comms in a 50 Feet radius for 30 Minutes.

gear.name: Auto-Hacker
gear.description: Automatically hacks into anything below DC 12 difficulty. Single Use.

gear.name: Comm Tap Bug
gear.description: Spy device. Records 10 Minutes of nearby audio.

gear.name: Stain-B-Gone
gear.description: Removes blood, oil, and gunk from surfaces.

gear.name: Fire Extinguisher
gear.description: Kills fire dead. Removes Burning effect from an area.

gear.name: DustMask+
gear.description: Basic filter against smog and allergens.

gear.name: Emergency Shield Foam
gear.traits: Covers a 10 Feet area line in a wall of foam. Light (10HP)
gear.description: Thrown, 30 Feet range. Pop and foam!

gear.name: Snack Tube
gear.description: Nutrient-dense chip blend with weird texture.

gear.name: First Aid Kit
gear.description: A standard over the counter first aid kit.

gear.name: Emergency Medical Kit
gear.description: The kind of kit you find behind counters and attached to walls.

gear.name: EMT-grade Medkit
gear.description: A medical kit for professional EMTs.

gear.name: Saviour, Mil-grade Medical Kit
gear.description: A medical kit for professional combat medics and corporate security.

gear.name: Pocket Torch
gear.description: Small rechargeable flashlight. Emits directional light.

gear.name: Credit Stub Wallet
gear.description: Stores up to 5 different personal credit accounts.

gear.name: Quick-Iris Lenses
gear.description: Eye color changer. Change your eye colour.

gear.name: Reversible Jacket
gear.traits: +1 to Infiltration or Stealth; Infiltration, Stealth

gear.name: ID Chip Lanyard
gear.description: Personal identification chip reader on a neck strap; required for access to secure buildings.

gear.name: Climbing Claws
gear.description: Allows climbing on vertical surfaces using Parkour.

gear.name: Military Comm Link
gear.description: An encrypted communications device for military use.

gear.name: Stun Cuffs
gear.description: If placed on an incapacitated target, Stuns them if they try to move too vigorously.

gear.name: Illegal AR Projector
gear.description: Create a holographic duplicate of a person. Stationary.

gear.name: Gremlin Daemon
gear.description: DC 14 Anti-Hack ICE program. Attacks anyone attempting to Hack past it.

gear.name: Balrog Daemon
gear.description: DC 18 Anti-Hack ICE program. Attacks anyone attempting to Hack past it.

gear.name: Foldable Umbrella
gear.description: Compact and waterproof, unfolds in one flick. Protects from rain, acid or otherwise.

gear.name: Reinforced Umbrella
gear.description: A weapon against sunburn and rain.

gear.name: NovaTech Riot Purifier
gear.traits: Big Guns, Knockback, Fires Twice Per Round

gear.name: Adrenaline Stim
gear.traits: Cyberware, once per Combat, gain 10 Feet of Movement as a Free Action

gear.name: Corp-grade Augs
gear.traits: Cyberware, Thermal Vision, HUD Time/Map Overlay

gear.name: HelixCo Adaptive Optics
gear.traits: Cyberware, Thermal Vision, Low-Light, Hacking Enabled

gear.name: Syntac Adrenal Cascade
gear.traits: Cyberware, Gain 1 Bonus Action, Once per Combat

gear.name: Apex Auto-Med Dermis
gear.traits: Cyberware, Heal 1HP at the end of every Round

gear.name: Nimble Reflex Jailbreaker
gear.traits: Cyberware, Once per Combat, gain an additional Reaction

gear.name: Boxvan
gear.traits: Vehicle, Seats-2, Cargo Space (Medium), Piloting DC: 10

gear.name: Utility Truck
gear.traits: Vehicle, Seats-2, Cargo Space (Large), Piloting DC: 10

gear.name: Delivery Van
gear.traits: Vehicle, Seats-2, Cargo Space (Large), Piloting DC: 10

gear.name: Aegis-Armoured Diplomat
gear.armament: Roof-Mounted Turret; Big Gun; 3D6 Damage; 90 Feet Range

gear.name: Escort Vanguard
gear.armament: Light Turret; Big Gun; 2D6 Damage; 90 Feet Range
